race.description: Ladbrokes Summer Sprint Series Final Handicap (Bm78)
race.comment: LAA DE SHA (2) narrowly on top. He's in great form this campaign, coming right away as favourite from back in the field last start over this track and distance to win well. With even luck in running from the inside gate he can prove too sharp again. DUCHESS ZOU (5) resumes with an imposing record. She was last seen starting $1.65 in a good 3yo race at Flemington and winning well having placed behind Bridal Waltz and She's An Artist at Listed level prior. That form stands out and she could just be too good. LUNA CAT (7) has been in some handy races of late and is good enough on her day, respecting each way. MYTEMPTATION (3) has the ability to figure and should get into a good spot near the pace.

favourite.owners: Ciaron Maher Racing, Widden Stud Pty Ltd, W J Betar & Telemon Stud
